title: elaphoglossum pangoanum
intro: Elaphoglossum pangoanum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic or terrestrial plant. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum pangoanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, protect against oxidative stress, and potentially alleviate symptoms associated with certain diseases. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and has been used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety require further scientific study.
